owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Tray JSON now aligns ready-state next_action metadata with the monthly reactive owner-test contract while non-ready states stay fail-closed; the next bounded multiplayer/runtime gap is surfacing zero-history bootstrap provenance in MP handoff status so host-visible artifacts can distinguish history-backed output from bootstrap fallback.

chunks.title: Surface MP bootstrap provenance
chunks.goal: Surface whether an MP package carries zero-history/bootstrap-generated policy data so multiplayer handoff artifacts can distinguish history-backed output from conservative bootstrap fallback.
acceptance: Ready MP package status exposes source-quality/bootstrap provenance in a stable machine-readable form.
SNC or MP verify owner-facing output can show when the handoff package includes zero_history_bootstrap data without reopening the generated overlay manifest manually.
Missing or malformed provenance data stays fail-closed instead of being guessed.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after MP bootstrap provenance surface
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after MP bootstrap provenance is surfaced in handoff status.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped MP bootstrap provenance surface.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving the MP bootstrap provenance chunk as the head item.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
